## For new mini-apps

**App slug:** `src/apps/`

- [ ] `meta.ts` created with all required fields
- [ ] App appears on the feed at `http://localhost:8080`
- [ ] Detail page renders correctly at `/project/<slug>`
- [ ] (If `index.tsx` included) App launches at `/apps/<slug>`

---

## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` → zero errors
- [ ] `npm run lint` → passes
- [ ] `npm run test` → passes
- [ ] Tested on mobile viewport
- [ ] i18n: new keys added to **both** `en.json` and `vi.json` (platform changes only)
